summary: Iteration 3 verified end-to-end. Backend: 29/29 pytest pass — admin Bearer auth (401 without / 401 wrong / 200 correct on all 4 admin endpoints), atomic queue counter monotonic + unique ref_codes, narrowed referral endpoint returns ONLY {referral_count}, rate limits enforced (5/min EA+contact, 10/min quiz, 30/min referral), no _id leaked anywhere, response time <2.5s. Frontend: all 14 routes load (200), SF Pro stack confirmed in computed font-family (-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, SF Pro Display...), Early Access form submits and shows Founders Circle card with queue_position + ref_code, Contact form POST returns 200 with success toast, Quiz first step renders correctly (full traversal not completed by automation but backend covered).

minor.issue: Rate-limit test was flaky once (saw 7x200 in a back-to-back run; passes standalone after window resets). slowapi uses fixed-window per-minute which can carry over budget across short runs. Functional behaviour confirmed correct.

critical_code_review_comments: require_admin uses secrets.compare_digest on full 'Bearer <token>' string — correct constant-time compare, good.
next_queue_position uses findOneAndUpdate with $inc + upsert — atomic & race-safe.
Unique index on ref_code created at startup with sparse=True + retry loop (5 attempts) on DuplicateKeyError — defensive, good.
Referral projection {'_id': 0, 'referral_count': 1} correctly narrowed; no PII leak.
Backfill of counter on startup uses count_documents which is safe but only runs when counter doc absent — correct one-time bootstrap.
Counter '_id': 'early_access_position' is string and counters collection is separate — no collision with early_access docs.

Minor: ADMIN_TOKEN fallback to empty string + 503 is fine, but consider failing startup loudly if missing in production. Currently a missing token will surface as 503 on first admin call which is acceptable.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on routes + EA + Contact; Quiz API verified via pytest

test_credentials: ADMIN_TOKEN read from /app/backend/.env (Kv9Up6myVI3C9WekNLy2bhhHM6sDbC17yO2kbQm8kJU); also documented in /app/memory/test_credentials.md
seed_data_creation: Test data prefixed with TEST_ (emails TEST_*@example.com) — left in DB intentionally; no cleanup required for read-only verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: backend_test.py now has 29 tests including TestAdminAuth (parametrized 4 admin paths x 3 cases) + TestAtomicQueueCounter + narrowed TestReferralLookup. shared_ref_code is module-scoped to avoid 5/min EA rate-limit collision between TestEarlyAccess, TestAtomicQueueCounter and TestReferralLookup. Always export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env before running pytest. If rate-limit tests flake, sleep 65s and re-run isolated.
